CONTENT.Career: Ladinetti made his Serie A debut for Cagliari on 18 July 2020 in a game against Sassuolo.On 5 October 2020, he joined Serie C club Olbia on loan. On 31 January 2022, Ladinetti returned to Olbia on a new loan.On 6 August 2022, Ladinetti signed with Serie C side Pontedera.Ladinetti joined Catania, also of Serie C, in July 2023.After 10 appearances with the Sicilian club, Ladinetti concludes the loan to move to Taranto, still in Group C of Serie C.

SUMMARY: Riccardo Ladinetti (born 20 December 2000) is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie C Group B club Pontedera.
